events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: missing guides near an expansion loop on an in-service line is a **fail**, **high risk**, non-compliant condition — without guides the loop can rack/buckle under thermal cycling and overstress anchors, nozzles, and adjacent supports. Recommended action is to install guides per the project support standard and MSS SP-58 spacing, inspect for existing distress, and restrict thermal cycling until corrected.
